fields.label: Product Profile
fields.value: The Investments under the strategy predominantly comprise of stocks having Larger Market Caps. The objective is to outperform the Large Cap segment of the market through constructing a relatively stable portfolio with high level of liquidity and lower impact cost.

fields.label: Universe of Investments
fields.value: Stocks comprising the top 200 by market capitalization.

fields.label: No. of companies in the portfolio
Product Profile
fields.value: The strategy seeks to provide Long term capital appreciation by investing primarily in stocks having Mid & Small Market Caps with high growth potential. The objective of the strategy is to outperform the Mid & Small Cap segment of the market.

fields.label: Universe of Investment
fields.value: Stocks within top 100–800 by market capitalization.

fields.label: No. of companies in the portfolio
Product Profile
fields.value: The strategy seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation by investing primarily in stocks with smaller market cap and high growth potential. Dynamo is designed for investors seeking to capture the higher return potential of India's small cap segment, accepting higher short-term volatility in exchange for superior long-term compounding.

fields.label: No. of companies in the portfolio
Product Profile
fields.value: A Multicap strategy, which takes the benefit of returns across the market cap spectrum. Investing in basket of companies which will be a mix of large/mid/small cap companies. Relative allocation between large/mid/small cap companies will vary basis different market factors.

fields.label: Universe of Investments
fields.value: Stocks within top 700 by market capitalization.

fields.label: No. of companies in the portfolio
Product Profile
fields.value: Stock selection based on models used by PicoPower PMS and Dynamo PMS, which have consistently outperformed the market.

fields.label: Investment Universe
fields.value: Between 200 to 800 Largest by Market Cap.

fields.label: Number of Stocks in the Portfolio
Product Profile
fields.value: A Multicap strategy, which takes the benefit of returns across the market cap spectrum depending on market conditions.
